pendingApplications.address: Green Steps Tewkesbury Road Uckington Cheltenham Gloucestershire GL51 9SL
pendingApplications.proposal: The building to be demolished comprises a single storey detached structure of timber frame construction. The building is of simple construction and modest scale. The structure includes external walls formed in lightweight construction materials with a pitched roof structure above. The building is currently vacant and no longer required for operational purposes. The structure is not listed and does not form part of a conservation area or sensitive heritage setting. The proposed works involve the demolition of the building down to slab level and removal of all associated demolition materials from site.
